original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Swollen Eyelid – 40
original_registry_entry.population: People with eyelid swelling, including stye, chalazion, blepharitis, allergy, infection, trauma, and lesion differentials, with telehealth exclusions.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: DHA-licensed telehealth services with face-to-face or specialist referral where indicated.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Direct for selected Dubai telehealth stye, blepharitis, eyelid-feature, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, medicine choice, dose, treatment instruction, procedure, urgency conclusion, and fixed follow-up remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Sections 1.2 and 5.1 — common eyelid symptoms and styes
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented eyelid irritation, redness, swelling, discharge, pain context, stye or hordeolum identity, typical eyelid-lump appearance, and selected risk-factor fields.

exact_sections.heading: Section 5.3 — blepharitis
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports blepharitis identity, watery or red eyes, gritty, burning, stinging, greasy, itchy, swollen or crusted eyelids, light sensitivity, eyelid observation, and clinician-documented eyelid-hygiene discussion.

exact_sections.heading: Section 9 — referral criteria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led referral, worsening, vision change, severe redness, severe pain, photophobia, spread, trauma, uncertain diagnosis, and refractory-symptom documentation without automatically concluding urgency.

title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Swollen Eyelid – 40
population: People with eyelid swelling, including stye, chalazion, blepharitis, allergy, infection, trauma, and lesion differentials, with telehealth exclusions.
intended_setting: DHA-licensed telehealth services with face-to-face or specialist referral where indicated.
access_limitations: Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
